title: World of Milk and Bread
description: A mod that adds various items related to milk and bread in one way or another. Very similar to the April Fools' Day Minecraft snapshots.
body:
# 🥛 World of Milk & Bread Update (25w14milk)

![environment_server](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-server-1976d2?style=flat-square)
![environment_client](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-1976d2?style=flat-square)
![forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-Forge-orange?style=flat-square)

A chaotic (but surprisingly balanced) milk & bread themed Minecraft mod.  
Inspired by classic April Fools’ snapshots — but actually playable.

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT
**Worldofmilk versions 0.3.0 and above require [MilkyLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/milkylib) 0.1.3 and above**

---

## 🧀 What does this mod add?

### 🥛 Milk Blocks

- Milk Block (falling block)
- Milk Layer Block (like snow layers)
- Dense Milk Block set:
  - Block
  - Slab
  - Stairs
  - Fence
  - Fence Gate
  - Door
  - Trapdoor
  - Button
  - Pressure Plate
  - Sign
  - Hanging Sign
- Carved Dense Milk variants
- Jeb Block
- Dinnerbone Block
- Fridge Block

Milk layers can stack and interact physically with the world.

---

### 🍞 Pressed Bread Equipment (EPIC Tier)

A completely new material tier: **Pressed Bread**

**Tools:**
- Bread Sword
- Bread Pickaxe
- Bread Axe
- Bread Shovel
- Bread Hoe

**Armor Set:**
- Bread Helmet
- Bread Chestplate
- Bread Leggings
- Bread Boots
- Baked Bread Helmet
- Baked Bread Chestplate
- Baked Bread Leggings
- Baked Bread Boots

✔ Fire resistant  
✔ Epic rarity  
✔ Custom smithing upgrade  

Upgrade your Netherite gear using the **Pressed Bread Upgrade Template**.

---

### 🧈 Butter Equipment (RARE tier)

A completely new material tier: **Butter**

**Tools**
- Butter Sword
- Butter Pickaxe
- Butter Axe
- Butter Shovel
- Butter Hoe

**Armor Set**:
- Butter Helmet
- Butter Chestplate
- Butter Leggings
- Butter Boots

Upgrade your Iron gear using the **Pressed Butter Upgrade Template**.
✔ Fire resistant  
✔ Epic rarity  
✔ Custom smithing upgrade

---

### 🥛 Food & Sweets

- Concentrated Milk
- Bread with Concentrated Milk
- Butter Bucket
- Pressed Butter
- Bread with Butter
- Dough
- Easter Cake (and blank version)
- Sprinkles
- Waffle
- Ice Cream Ball
- Ice Cream
- Ice Cream with Waffle Plombir

Some milk-based foods can remove potion effects (just like milk buckets 👀).

---

### 🏹 Special Arrows

- Ender Pearl Arrow (teleportation-based projectile)
- TNT Arrow (explosive projectile)

Both arrows have custom entities.

---

### 🧟 Milk Zombie

A custom hostile mob:

- Milk Zombie
- Monster category
- Fully integrated into the game

---

### 🐱 Custom Cat Variants

New cat skins:

- Filya
- Gray
- Bald

Naturally usable in-game as proper cat variants.

---

### 🖼️ Custom Paintings

New 64x64 paintings:

- glackus
- wandarmo
- kapitankastet
- plytoni
- filya cat
- gray cat
- bald cat
- mary dog

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install **Minecraft Forge** for the supported version.
2. Open your `.minecraft` folder.
3. Create a `mods` folder if it doesn't exist.
4. Place the mod `.jar` file inside the `mods` folder.
5. Launch the game with Forge.

---

## 🖼️ Screenshots

  ![SmithingUpd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i0c6cgdD/images/7ca1140b671c2dc5aaa60e8c595114e439b45001.png)
- Smithing table upgrade (Pressed Bread gear)
![Creative](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i0c6cgdD/images/73f63980ca33290e51bc5682036aa2cecb477ea8.png)
- Creative inventory
![Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i0c6cgdD/images/a0ebf95859803f6ee34cc7482d0a16a53560f3ec.png)
- Armor trim application
![Cats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/i0c6cgdD/images/2dce87870f94297288b6358a17297ec4251095ff.png)
- Custom cat variants

---

## ⚠️ Notes

This mod is not just a meme — it is designed to be playable in survival.
If you enjoy weird but structured content expansions — this is for you.

---

## 🐞 Bug Reporting

I found a bug! What should I do?
Don't worry! You can report the bug on our [GitHub](https://github.com/LighSync/issues) or [Discord server](https://discord.gg/KYyAuYssvT)

---

## ❤️ Credits

Created by **LighSync Games**
Authors:
  - Gleb Ustimenko (nogai3, glackus) - Developer, concept creator, texturing
  - Konstantin Fadeev (KAPITANKASTET, progun_na) - The originator of the idea, responsible for creativity
  - Platon Unterov (PLYTONI) - The author of the idea is responsible for the soundtrack, which will appear later.

Milk supremacy.
Bread technology.
Absolute chaos.
